channel.title: GitHub CMake Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of CMake in GitHub

item.title: microsoft/vcpkg
item.description: C++ Library Manager for Windows, Linux, and MacOS

item.title: cpm-cmake/CPM.cmake
item.description: 📦 CMake's missing package manager. A small CMake script for setup-free, cross-platform, reproducible dependency management.

item.title: ROCm/rocm-cmake
item.description: CMake modules used within the ROCm libraries

item.title: bilke/cmake-modules
item.description: Additional CMake functionality. Most of the modules are from Ryan Pavlik (https://github.com/rpavlik/cmake-modules)

item.title: StableCoder/cmake-scripts
item.description: Easy-to-add enhancements for any C/C++ CMake project. Including AFL fuzzing, code-coverage, Thread/Address/Leak/Address/Undefined sanitizer instrumentation, compilation of GLSL shaders and more.
